title: Release 0.3.11 bootstrap/install regressions
acceptanceCriteria: Broken preload no longer reports Node.js 22+ as missing when Node is present.
Root cause is classified explicitly as environment contamination vs repo-managed preload requirement.
install.ps1 and install.sh use the same truthful bootstrap classification strategy.
Installer warning surfaces remain truthful and do not hide real Telegram/Codex/port warnings.
TUI step indicators are readable again and no longer degrade into an unstable running glyph.
Proof bundle is complete and a fresh verifier pass succeeds.
